hero.label: About Fixoboard
hero.subline: Operating under Atlantic Polymers Pvt. Ltd., Fixoboard has become India's benchmark for PVC and WPC building materials — engineered for professionals who demand lasting quality.

story.label: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Operating under the umbrella of <strong1>Atlantic Polymers Pvt. Ltd.</strong1>, our brand <strong2>Fixoboard</strong2> has become synonymous with industrial reliability. With over 30 years of history, we are one of India's largest producers and indenting houses for PVC products.
story.paragraph2: Our inclusion in the Limca Book of Indian Records stands as an official testament to our achievements in product innovation. From our strategic branch in Dubai to our vast national footprint, we provide global sourcing expertise at an industrial scale.
story.since1994Desc: Continuous evolution from polymer indenting to advanced board manufacturing.
story.dubaiDesc: International sourcing and distribution hub connecting global markets.

capability.silvassaDesc: High-capacity extrusion plant employing cutting-edge technology for consistent board density and dimensional accuracy.
capability.qualityDesc: Every production batch adheres to rigorous international standards for thickness, density, and screw retention.
capability.deliveryDesc: Time-bound schedules and robust logistics ensure your project stays on track without material delays.

rnd.label: Research & Innovation
rnd.paragraph: Our dedicated R&D department continuously refines polymer composites to develop materials that exceed current industrial benchmarks. We don't just supply — we innovate based on real-world furniture industry feedback.

mission.label: Purpose & Direction
mission.missionParagraph: To manufacture and deliver world-class PVC and WPC building materials that empower architects, carpenters, and builders across India — with products that outlast, outperform, and out-value every traditional alternative.
mission.visionQuote: To dominate the future by replacing every piece of traditional plywood, MDF, and particle board with a sustainable, industrial-grade composite that delivers lifetime value.

founded.title: Founded in Mumbai
founded.desc: Atlantic Polymers Pvt. Ltd. established in Mumbai as one of India's earliest polymer indenting houses, laying the foundation for three decades of excellence.

silvassa.title: Silvassa Manufacturing
silvassa.desc: Commissioned our state-of-the-art manufacturing facility in Silvassa — marking the shift from indenting to full-scale domestic production.

limca.title: Limca Book of Records
limca.desc: Fixoboard entered the Limca Book of Indian Records for achievement in product innovation — a nationally recognised milestone in our industry.

dubai.title: Dubai Branch Opened
dubai.desc: Established an international presence with our Dubai branch, enabling global sourcing capabilities and access to international markets.

sgs.title: SGS Certification
sgs.desc: Achieved SGS international quality certification — validating our manufacturing processes against the world's most rigorous industrial standards.

wpc.title: WPC Product Range Launch
wpc.desc: Expanded into the WPC segment with doors, door frames, and boards — completing Fixoboard's vision of a full building materials ecosystem.

green.label: Green Revolution
green.crisisDesc: Illegal logging contributes to 14% of global ecological damage. Traditional plywood depends on harvesting these vital resources.
green.alternativeDesc: Every board produced is 100% recyclable, zero-emission, and does not harm a single tree. It is the definitive sustainable choice.
green.badgeDesc: Zero emission production facility powered by ethical energy standards at Silvassa.
